BatchDeleteRecipeVersion.description: Grants permission to delete one or more recipe versions

CreateDataset.description: Grants permission to create a dataset

CreateProfileJob.description: Grants permission to create a profile job

CreateProject.description: Grants permission to create a project

CreateRecipe.description: Grants permission to create a recipe

CreateRecipeJob.description: Grants permission to create a recipe job

CreateRuleset.description: Grants permission to create a ruleset

CreateSchedule.description: Grants permission to create a schedule

DeleteDataset.description: Grants permission to delete a dataset

DeleteJob.description: Grants permission to delete a job

DeleteProject.description: Grants permission to delete a project

DeleteRecipeVersion.description: Grants permission to delete a recipe version

DeleteRuleset.description: Grants permission to delete a ruleset

DeleteSchedule.description: Grants permission to delete a schedule

DescribeDataset.description: Grants permission to view details about a dataset

DescribeJob.description: Grants permission to view details about a job

DescribeJobRun.description: Grants permission to view details about job run for a given job

DescribeProject.description: Grants permission to view details about a project

DescribeRecipe.description: Grants permission to view details about a recipe

DescribeRuleset.description: Grants permission to view details about a ruleset

DescribeSchedule.description: Grants permission to view details about a schedule

ListDatasets.description: Grants permission to list datasets in your account

ListJobRuns.description: Grants permission to list job runs for a given job

ListJobs.description: Grants permission to list jobs in your account

ListProjects.description: Grants permission to list projects in your account

ListRecipeVersions.description: Grants permission to list versions in your recipe

ListRecipes.description: Grants permission to list recipes in your account

ListRulesets.description: Grants permission to list rulesets in your account

ListSchedules.description: Grants permission to list schedules in your account

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to retrieve tags associated with a resource

PublishRecipe.description: Grants permission to publish a major verison of a recipe

SendProjectSessionAction.description: Grants permission to submit an action to the interactive session for a project

StartJobRun.description: Grants permission to start running a job

StartProjectSession.description: Grants permission to start an interactive session for a project

StopJobRun.description: Grants permission to stop a job run for a job

TagResource.description: Grants permission to add tags to a resource

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove tags associated with a resource

UpdateDataset.description: Grants permission to modify a dataset

UpdateProfileJob.description: Grants permission to modify a profile job

UpdateProject.description: Grants permission to modify a project

UpdateRecipe.description: Grants permission to modify a recipe

UpdateRecipeJob.description: Grants permission to modify a recipe job

UpdateRuleset.description: Grants permission to modify a ruleset

UpdateSchedule.description: Grants permission to modify a schedule

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
